zh.lifeSummary: 當Florence de Akeni於1210年出生在英國艾可布拉德維爾--希亞時，她的父親Roger de Akeni30歲，母親Joan30歲。她於1246年與Matthew de la Mare在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年在她的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Florence de Akeni于1210年出生在英国艾可布拉德維爾--希亞时，她的父亲Roger de Akeni30岁，母亲Joan30岁。她于1246年与Matthew de la Mare在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年在她的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Akeni
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Enza, Gino, Pasquale, Philomena, Vincenzo.  Spanish Elva, Nestor, Ricardo, Rosario.
Italian: either a metonymic occupational name for a seller of oats (see Avena ) or from the Latin personal name Avenius.

variants.name: Avena
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Ana, Arturo, Blanca, Domingo, Felipe, Francisco, Gerado, Gerardo, Gilberto, Guillermo.  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmine, Giuseppe, Leonardo, Vito, Carmela, Ettore, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian and Spanish: metonymic occupational name for a grain grower or merchant, from avena ‘oats, oatmeal’ (from Latin avena).
Italian: habitational name from a place in Calabria called Avena.

nameMeanings.name: Florence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

variants.name: Florance
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Florence de Akeni was born in 1210, in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England, her father, Roger de Akeni, was 30 and her mother, Joan, was 30. She married Matthew de la Mare in 1246, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1284, in her hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Florence de Akeni est née en 1210, à Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Akeni, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Matthew de la Mare en 1246, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1284, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Florence de Akeni 1210 in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Akeni 30 und ihre Mutter Joan 30. Sie hat 1246 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Matthew de la Mare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1284 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Florence de Akeni è nata il nel 1210 nel Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England, sua padre, Roger de Akeni, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Matthew de la Mare nel 1246, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1284, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Florence de Akeniが1210年にイギリスエセックスブラドウエル-オン-セアで生まれた時，父Roger de Akeniは30歳，母Joanは30歳であった。1246年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでMatthew de la Mareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Florence de Akeni(이)가 1210년 영국 에세스 브라드웰--시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Akeni(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Matthew de la Mare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Florence de Akeni nasceu em 1210, em Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Akeni, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Matthew de la Mare em 1246, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1284, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Florence de Akeni родилась в 1210 г. в местности брадвелл-он-сеа, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Akeni было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matthew de la Mare в 1246 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1284 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Florence de Akeni nació en 1210, en Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Akeni, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Matthew de la Mare en 1246, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1284, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
